Class CreateCountryController

java.lang.Object
com.risk.controller.CreateCountryController
All Implemented Interfaces:
ViewActionListener
public class CreateCountryController extends Object implements ViewActionListener
In CreateCountryController, the data flow into model object and updates the view whenever data changes.
Version:
1.0.0
